# Command: /init-subtask-workspace <epic_name> <item_name>

Deprecated compatibility alias.

Use `/init-workstream <epic_name> <item_name>` instead.

## Current Behavior

- Creates one markdown work item under `workstreams/` by default
- Updates `tasks/README.md`
- Does not create `context.md`, `architecture.md`, `plan.md`, or `review/`
